title: Crayon packages continuous CI monitoring with AI deliverables
claim: Crayon combines automated analysis, competitive call mining, saved searches, and AI-generated deliverables to structure intelligence and keep it accessible in seller workflows.
source_snippet: Automated analysis, call mining, saved searches, and AI-generated competitive deliverables.
implication: ProductOS research should support saved searches, repeatable competitor templates, and scheduled refreshes instead of only ad hoc scans.
followup_questions: Which recurring watchlists should ProductOS refresh on a schedule versus on demand?
